title: Commercial OEM Source Acquisition & Handoff Directive
objective: Acquire Motorcraft Workshop Manual (incl. Section 501-14 and chassis/electrical sections as available) and Electrical Wiring Diagram (EWD) bytes to resolve KG-001 (door pinout/routing), KG-005 (regulator fasteners/torque), and KG-008 / MEPQ-003 (firewall LV gateway interconnect).
success_criteria: Deposit WSM 501-14 PDF bytes under research/incoming/ with SHA-256 + acquisition manifest.
Deposit EWD Cell 59 (Power Windows) PDF bytes with SHA-256 + acquisition manifest.
Deposit or index EWD cells covering cab-to-engine / firewall pass-through once designation is confirmed from bytes (operator candidate C127 — not assumed).
Run parser fixtures without inventing torque/pin values; claims remain ASSERTION_EXTRACTED until token-anchor ASSERTION_VERIFIED.
Do not promote any F-450 door or LV edge to VERIFIED or authorize procedure generation.
evidence_required: EWD Cell 59 connector designation / pinout for FL door power window
EWD coverage of cab-to-engine / firewall interconnect (designation confirmed from bytes)
priority_note: Commercial paywall handoff — coordinates with MISN-000001 (EWD primary) and MISN-000006 (LV gateway discovery). Does not replace either.
cost_access_note: Motorcraft / Helm reported ~$21.95/day access — human purchasing agent required
notes: Do not fabricate file hashes or torque/pin values.
Expanded under DT-D054 to also feed MEPQ-003 / KG-008.
